name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 (15-inch)
introText: The Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 15-inch runs on Snapdragon X Elite, delivering up to 20 hours of battery life with native Windows Copilot+ AI features in a 1.66kg all-aluminum chassis.
whatWorks: Snapdragon X Elite delivers excellent battery life with strong CPU performance — the ARM chip excels at efficiency, providing 20-hour battery that beats most Intel counterparts at this price.
PixelSense Flow 120Hz display is sharp and accurate — the 2496x1664 resolution at 15 inches produces a comfortable pixel density for extended work sessions.
worthKnowing: ARM (Snapdragon) means some legacy x86 apps run under emulation — most modern apps are ARM-native, but some older or niche Windows software may have compatibility issues.
No USB-A port — the Surface Laptop 7 has USB-C, Thunderbolt 4, and a proprietary Surface Connect port but no USB-A. An adapter is needed for USB-A peripherals.

commonComplaints.title: ARM app compatibility concerns
commonComplaints.body: While the emulation layer handles most software well, some specialized enterprise tools, games, and older utilities run poorly or not at all on Snapdragon X.

commonComplaints.title: No USB-A port
commonComplaints.body: The Surface Laptop 7 omits USB-A entirely — users with USB-A devices (drives, peripherals) need a Surface USB-C to USB-A adapter.

commonComplaints.title: Pricier than competing ARM laptops
commonComplaints.body: The Samsung Galaxy Book5 Pro offers a similar feature set with a better display at a similar price. Surface premium is partly for the Microsoft brand.

verdict: The Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 15-inch is the best large-screen Windows laptop for users who want excellent battery life and a Microsoft-curated experience. Check that your essential software is ARM-compatible before committing — most modern apps are, but the edge cases matter.

realBuyers.quote: Battery actually lasts 17–18 hours in my use. The Snapdragon chip is incredible for efficiency.
All my work apps run perfectly. No compatibility issues whatsoever for an office user.
The 15-inch screen is perfect for spreadsheets. Don't need an external monitor anymore.

metaDescription: Microsoft Surface Laptop 7 15" review Canada: Snapdragon X Elite, 20-hr battery, 1.66kg. ~$1,799 CAD. Best Windows 15-inch laptop for Canadians.
